About this item

  • Shades to Complement You: Available in multiple color tones designed to match your personal style and preferences
  • Auto On & Connect: The Go Air Tones+ True Wireless earbuds turn on and connect to each other automatically. Just take them out of their USB charging case for seamless, hassle-free connection. Then just connect the ear buds to your phone. Utilising Bluetooth 5.1, this is our fastest handsfree connection yet
  • Smaller Fit Ear Buds: Smaller than a credit card, the Go Air Tones+ buds case fits in your pocket and the Bluetooth earbuds are our smallest yet; 15% smaller and 40% lighter with the small case, than the Go Air wireless earphones. Suitable for the gym, sport or to carry while running. Try the three tip sizes to get a snug in ear headphones fit and creating a secure seal for crystal clear sound
  • Custom Sound: Download the JLab app to tailor your listening experience further. Control touch functions, adjust Be Aware settings, and personalize sound preferences with EQ presets including JLab Signature, Balanced, or Bass Boost
  • Battery Life: Listen for the long battery life with your wireless earphones; stay for the comfort. Go Air Tones+ features 9+ hours of playtime in each earbud and 26+ extra hours from the charging case. That's 35+ hours of playtime with your bluetooth earphones
  • Be Aware Mode & Google Fast Pair: Stay aware of your surroundings and let ambient noise in with Be Aware Mode for safe listening. Plus enjoy effortless pairing with an Android device and locate missing earbuds with Google Fast Pair
  • Be Aware Mode + Google Fast Pair: Stay aware of your surroundings and let ambient noise in with Be Aware Mode for safe listening . Plus enjoy effortless pairing with an Android device and locate missing earbuds with Google Fast Pair.

Product description

JLab App

Customize Your Sound

Easily customize your sound experience using the JLab app. Control touch functions, adjust Be Aware settings, and personalize sound preferences with EQ presets including JLab signature, Balanced, or Bass Boost.

  1. Long battery life


    Enjoy up to 9+ hours of playtime on a single charge for each earbud, and if you need more juice, the slim charging case provides an additional 26+ hours of playtime. Plus, conveniently recharge the case with its integrated USB-C charging cable, allowing you to get an hour of playtime with just 10 minutes of charging.

  2. Dual Connect


    Choose between using either earbud independently or together, while ensuring clear calls thanks to the built-in MEMS microphone in each bud.

  3. The Right Fit


    GO Air Tones offer a compact and comfortable fit. Experiment with the three sets of gel eartips to find the perfect seal for crystal-clear sound.

  4. Be Aware Mode + Google Fast Pair


    Stay aware of your surroundings and let ambient noise in with Be Aware Mode for safe listening. Plus enjoy effortless pairing with an Android device and locate missing earbuds with Google Fast Pair.

Speaker 6mm Dynamic Driver
Freq Response 20 - 20 kHz
Microphone 2 x MEMS
Impedance 16 Ω
Protocols HSP / HFP / A2DP / AVRCP
Codecs SBC
Battery Life 9+ hours

Case Charge Time < 2 hours
Charge Plug Integrated USB-C
Control Type(s) Touch
Voice Assistant Siri / Google
IP Rating (earbuds only) IPX4 (earbuds only)

    How customer reviews and ratings work

    Customer Reviews, including Product Star Ratings help customers to learn more about the product and decide whether it is the right product for them.

    To calculate the overall star rating and percentage breakdown by star, we don’t use a simple average. Instead, our system considers things like how recent a review is and if the reviewer bought the item on Amazon. It also analyzed reviews to verify trustworthiness.

    Learn more how customers reviews work on Amazon

    Review this product

    Share your thoughts with other customers
    Write a customer review

    Customers say

    Customers find these earbuds to be good value for money with great sound quality and appreciate the skin tone colors that match their skin. The battery life is impressive, with one customer noting it lasts forever. However, the ear fit is problematic as they keep falling out of the ears. Moreover, connectivity and functionality receive mixed reviews - while they pair easily with phones, some customers report pairing issues with iPhones, and while they work well initially, some units completely stop working.
    AI Generated from the text of customer reviews Generated from the text of customer reviews

    Amazon Customer
    5 out of 5 stars
    On the expensive side but worth it for a 2 year user.
    I absolutely love these headphones. I bought a pair about a year and a half ago. I lost them yesterday in my Uber so mad. These are the only headphones that I’ve been able to get where it’s clear and the sound is amazing. It was $30 to get them to me, but it’s worth it. It’s easy to connect. Like I said, the quality is amazing. It’s not muffled like you get with some earbuds or headphones.. I had to get a color that was different from the last one I had, if I got that color, I wouldn’t have had headphones until the eighth period and I need my music. So that’s why it was $30, I did the same day shipping.
    MoreHide

    Top reviews from the United States

    There was a problem filtering reviews. Please reload the page.

    • Desiree M.
      5.0 out of 5 stars i don't know...
      Reviewed in the United States on December 23, 2025
      Style: Tones+Color: F-474 CVerified Purchase
      ...i don't know how these are only $20. the sound quality is great for the price, but even more broadly, the VALUE IS THERE! i have used exclusively airpods for the last five or so years, so much so that i kinda forgot that other options exist. i was here, with one broken airpod (thanks to my dog--he's a good boy who doesn't chew on things but decided my airpod that unknowingly fell out of my pocket looked tasty, i guess?). this stuck me only using the left one while i "saved up" somehow--during the holidays--for a new pair of pros. after a week or two of using the one, it kinda dawned on me that, wait, there's more out there than just airpods lol. my man watches a ton of tech stuff on youtube, so it's not like i was unaware, it just didn't click FOR ME that there is more out there that i could actually use! once he turned me into an Apple girlie, i said there was no going back. and we all know nothing works as well with Apple than more Apple, right? it's true; the immediate connectivity and seamless pairing of airpods is unmatched. i won't sit and pretend that's not true. but these are a close second, as far as i can tell. i don't listen to music at home very often, especially not in earbuds; i'm usually listening to news, podcasts, reactions, etc. so i'm not looking for amazing sound quality by any means. BUT THESE HAVE IT! i put on TPAB to check and YEAH, THESE ARE GREAT! the familiar songs i know so well weren't lost to some cheap engineering or budget components. but for my normal use case scenario--listening to political news on a low volume while i'm working from home, listening to hip-hop media while cleaning the kitchen, or listening to reddit stories to drown out my man's snoring on those extra-loud nights, these are phenomenal. also EXTREMELY comfortable. i love the skin-tones they came out with, too. that's so frickin cute and thoughtful that i had to get a pair in my own skintone even though i'm more of a white/black girlie. it's so nice to have them blend in rather than be this white, obvious thing in my ear. i LOVE the app--it shows the battery level, lets you check for updates MANUALLY, but also has an equalizer, CUSTOM TOUCH CONTROLS!!!!!!!!! which i of course used to mimic the touch control of airpods just for ease of use, allows you to even set a volume limit to protect your ears. also comes with some built-in ambient noises which i am a big fan of. and the awareness feature -- i am assuming this is maybe for people who go on walks??? or, like me, wear them a lot but still have conversations here and there. i'm so super impressed with these LITERALLY TWENTY DOLLAR earbuds, i can't say it enough!!!

      i want to state that i am in no way compensated for this review, nor is this one of the increasingly-common AI-generated reviews you'll see on this platform, i am just genuinely so surprised by the quality and the comfort of these. i think these are an amazing, affordable option for anyone who is ready to burst out of their expensive Apple comfort zone, or on a budget trying to save up for something they think is "nicer" (trust me...you might change your mind on that part). these would make a wonderful gift for teens who lose things (i know all too well), or even just to have around as a backup pair. if i were still working in an office, i'd probably buy another to keep in my desk. they're THAT GOOD.

      still TBD is how well they work with a PC -- i've only used them with my phone, so far. if i decide to try that out, i'll come back to update :)
      Read more

      Reviewed in the United States on March 10, 2026

      Reviewed in the United States on January 26, 2026
      Style: Tones+Color: D-7572 WVerified Purchase
      These little ear buds are impressive for the price point. Honestly, if you don’t want to fork over big cash for AirPods, consider these.

      [Spoiler alert: these are not for hardcore audiophiles.]

      The sound quality is good and includes good passive noise canceling (this is basically where the sound reduction is done using the rubber tips instead of powered elements in the headphones). The JLab app really helps these ear buds shine. It includes features like Be Aware (similar to transparency mode on AirPods), basic EQ abilities, and ambient sounds.

      My only complaint about this is the sensitivity of the touch controls. I ended up turning them off because I will often where these to listen to something when I go to sleep, so it’s easy to accidentally trigger something on them when putting them in or taking them out. That being said, you can make adjustments to them inside of the app. I just didn’t take the time to do that.

      The case has a built in charging cable, but it is short and you’ll need a USB-C wall brick if you charge with a standard outlet.

      It comes with three sizes of ear tips, so you can select which ones fit your ear.

      All in all, I’d definitely buy these again.
      Read more
      11 people found this helpful
      Helpful
       Report
    • kimberlydenn
      4.0 out of 5 stars Helped This Mom Achieve Gym Junkie Status
      Reviewed in the United States on January 1, 2026
      Style: Tones+Color: A-4975 CVerified Purchase
      I purchased these, similar to others, thinking that at this price point, I wouldn't be too disappointed if they didn't work out. I will admit before getting into this review, that I come from a long line of.... dare I even say it..... AirPod Pros. And, like many of you, I lost one, and then I lost another. I purchased a second pair of AirPods, but this time not the Pros. And I lost those, too. After deciding that I simply could not be responsible for losing yet another pair of very expensive wireless headphones, I purchased these because I wanted something I could bring to the gym with me, or have with me for traveling. You hate to be the person that plays their Reels too loudly to attract attention from the people around you, but sometimes you just need to laugh.

      And so, I purchased these headphones.

      My number one concern was that they wouldn't fit in my ears because they are, well, small. I was pleasantly surprised to find sizing options for the rubber parts that fit onto the ear portion, and a size that worked for me! Yay! First win. It's admittedly not nearly as comfortable as the AirPod, but it's fine. I've worn them for several hours at a time while working, and it started to hurt after a little while, but balance, you know?

      My second area of concern was around the quality of the "Be Aware Mode". I have young kids, and being *AWARE* is a big part of how I need to function during the daytime, even if I am listening to a book (LOL, yeah, right... I'm listening to Sabrina Carpenter's explicit album in my ear) while they play outside (re: watch TV). I would say that this feature works OK. I might not have figured it out quite yet, and in that case, I would say perhaps it's not as functional/user friendly as the AirPods. But at this price, it's okay, and I do think part of this can be user error.... I will report back.

      I found the sound quality to be fabulous. We have a small home gym in our house and I was thoroughly engaged mentally because the music took over my ears. I was thrilled about this. I like to pretend I'm some gym junkie when I'm in my basement with my BowFlexes at 12.5lb on each arm doing split squats. These headphones have helped me to achieve that same level of "I'm a gym junkie" if not BETTER than my Air Pods ever did.

      I've been happy with my Air Pop+ headphones, and look forward to seeing how the next month goes. I just hope that I don't put these down in any cupholders again anytime soon.

      Cheers!
      Read more

    Product Summary: JLab Go Air Pop+ Tones True Wireless Earbuds, in Ear Headphones, Bluetooth Earphones, 35H Playtime Ear Buds with Microphone, USB-C Charging Case, Dual Connect, EQ3 Sound (1615 C)

    From JLab

    4.4 out of 5 stars, 5,475 ratings

    Customer reviews

    2K+ bought in past month

    Price

    One-time purchase: THB 575.82 30% Savings

    List Price: THB 822.75

    Purchasing options

    Other sellers

    Other sellers

    About this Item

    • Shades to Complement You: Available in multiple color tones designed to match your personal style and preferences
    • Auto On & Connect: The Go Air Tones+ True Wireless earbuds turn on and connect to each other automatically. Just take them out of their USB charging case for seamless, hassle-free connection. Then just connect the ear buds to your phone. Utilising Bluetooth 5.1, this is our fastest handsfree connection yet
    • Smaller Fit Ear Buds: Smaller than a credit card, the Go Air Tones+ buds case fits in your pocket and the Bluetooth earbuds are our smallest yet; 15% smaller and 40% lighter with the small case, than the Go Air wireless earphones. Suitable for the gym, sport or to carry while running. Try the three tip sizes to get a snug in ear headphones fit and creating a secure seal for crystal clear sound
    • Custom Sound: Download the JLab app to tailor your listening experience further. Control touch functions, adjust Be Aware settings, and personalize sound preferences with EQ presets including JLab Signature, Balanced, or Bass Boost
    • Battery Life: Listen for the long battery life with your wireless earphones; stay for the comfort. Go Air Tones+ features 9+ hours of playtime in each earbud and 26+ extra hours from the charging case. That's 35+ hours of playtime with your bluetooth earphones
    • Be Aware Mode & Google Fast Pair: Stay aware of your surroundings and let ambient noise in with Be Aware Mode for safe listening. Plus enjoy effortless pairing with an Android device and locate missing earbuds with Google Fast Pair
    • Be Aware Mode + Google Fast Pair: Stay aware of your surroundings and let ambient noise in with Be Aware Mode for safe listening . Plus enjoy effortless pairing with an Android device and locate missing earbuds with Google Fast Pair.

    Product Description

    Step into the future of audio with JLab Go Air Tones+ true wireless earbuds. These earbuds are not just headphones in-ear; they're an immersive sound experience laced with state-of-the-art features and premium build quality. Crafted to be 15% smaller than their predecessor, they offer seamless a wireless earphones experience. Our true wireless earbuds headphones fit easily within the compact USB charging case, ensuring a secure storage solution particularly for those on-the-go moments. Equipped with Bluetooth 5.1, these wireless headphones deliver efficient, fast connections, providing an elevated, hassle-free listening experience. The Go Air Tones+ Bluetooth earphones are not just a style statement but the custom EQ3 sound system provides a clear audio output, that's customisable to your personal preferences. Exemplifying convenience at its best, the Bluetooth earbuds are designed with dual connect functionality that allows you to use each earbud independently or together - no more concerns about switching or missing a connection. Thanks to the MEMS microphone embedded in each bud, receive and make clear calls. With an impressive battery life of 35+ hours, these IPX4 rated in ear headphones promise you undisturbed music marathon sessions. The convenient battery provides 9+ hours of playtime in each earbud and an extended 26+ hours from the charging case. These earphones prove to be an essential companion for work and travel. The touch controls and voice assistant integration make these Bluetooth wireless earbuds user-friendly, letting you take calls and shuffle through your music favourites on the move. The product comes complete with Go Air Tones+ earbuds, charging case, 3 Sets Gel Tips: Small, Medium, Large for a perfect fit, and a 2-year JLab warranty.
